meaning: n.举起的人,升降机,举重运动员,小偷,扒手
examples: Contrary to what one would expect, this kind of shop-lifter is rarely poor.
Fork lifter may to into the passage of each row of the rack, improving the utility ratio of warehouse.
Chocolate has long been held to be a mood-lifter.
Our favourite: the Scottish-style Pike Kilt lifter, with a malty taste and a smoky finish.
The hero's name is an acronym of his task: Waste Allocation Load Lifter Earth-Class, thus WALL-E.
